entries.title: Browser API Feature Adoption Tracker
entries.notes: Parses browser release notes and cross-references your site usage to flag APIs you're using that are deprecated or imminent. Buildable via background script with caniuse.com API. Niche but highly valuable for teams shipping to production.
entries.pain: Developers miss browser API deprecations until production breaks, wasting hours on retroactive fixes.

entries.title: Calendar Focus Time Integrity Guard
entries.notes: Scans calendar for meetings that overlap or sandwich focus blocks and alerts or auto-declines. Uses Google Calendar API. Simple concept, high frustration for knowledge workers.
entries.pain: Calendar invites silently erode focus blocks, making deep work impossible to protect.

entries.title: OAuth Token Expiration Sentinel
entries.notes: Monitors storage for OAuth tokens and shows countdown timers. Extension popup displays all detected tokens with expiration warnings. Quick build, immediate utility for devs dealing with OAuth flows.
entries.pain: OAuth tokens expire silently in dev environments, causing cryptic auth failures during demos.

entries.title: GCP Invoice Line Item Categorizer
entries.notes: Parses GCP billing exports and lets users tag services by team or product. Generates attribution reports. CSV parsing and localStorage for tags makes this fully offline-capable initially.
entries.pain: GCP invoices show service names without context, making it impossible to attribute costs to products.

entries.title: GitHub Issue Triage Speed Tracker
entries.notes: Queries GitHub API to track time-to-first-response by label, area, or maintainer. Generates weekly reports. Requires GitHub token auth. Clear value prop for OSS teams.
entries.pain: Open source maintainers have no visibility into how fast issues get triaged, leading to contributor frustration.

entries.title: Calendar Meeting Cadence Analyzer
entries.notes: Analyzes calendar to identify recurring meeting patterns and flags meetings that are identical or could be merged. Visual dashboard in popup. High engagement for remote workers.
entries.pain: Recurring meetings quietly multiply in number without anyone noticing the time sink.

entries.title: Sales Prospect Company News Timeline
entries.notes: Scrapes prospect company pages for news, funding, or hires and surfaces timeline in CRM context. Uses NewsAPI or custom scrapers. Direct CRM integration makes this sticky.
entries.pain: Sales reps miss timing on prospect company news, losing the window for relevant outreach.

entries.title: Gong Call Objection Response Library
entries.notes: Manually tagged library of objection categories linked to Gong clips. Searchable by objection type. Simple CRUD with video embedding. Low lift, high utility for sales teams.
entries.pain: Reps improvise responses to objections instead of learning from proven responses across the team.

entries.title: TypeScript Strict Mode Adoption Meter
entries.notes: Runs tsconfig analysis locally and tracks strict flag adoption over time. Popup shows progress bars per flag. Simple file parsing, no external dependencies.
entries.pain: Teams migrate to strict TypeScript incrementally but lose visibility into progress across the codebase.

entries.title: Browser Console Error Pattern Clusterer
entries.notes: Clusters console errors by stack trace similarity and surfaces unique errors first. Built-in pattern matching. Saves devs hours during incident debugging.
entries.pain: Console errors flood during debugging, hiding the root cause among similar noise.

entries.title: S3 Bucket Policy Complexity Analyzer
entries.notes: Parses IAM/JSON policies and visualizes complexity with scoring. Highlights contradictory statements. Direct S3 API integration for AWS users.
entries.pain: S3 bucket policies become tangled over time, creating security blind spots that audits miss.

entries.title: Gmail Attachment Version Sync
entries.notes: Detects when attachments with similar names are sent and flags which is newer. Builds a simple version history per thread. Popup shows timeline.
entries.pain: Teams lose track of which attachment version is current, causing confusion and rework.

entries.title: LLM Context Window Utilization Meter
entries.notes: Monitors clipboard and page content to estimate context usage. Shows remaining headroom before truncation. Works with any LLM interface.
entries.pain: LLM users run out of context without knowing how efficiently they're using available tokens.

entries.title: Third-Party Script Privacy Risk Grader
entries.notes: Scans loaded scripts and cross-references against known tracker databases. Grades each site by privacy risk. Builds awareness for privacy-conscious users.
entries.pain: Users have no idea which third-party scripts track them beyond what websites disclose.

entries.title: Meeting Transcript Auto-Chapter Generator
entries.notes: Uses speech-to-text and topic modeling to auto-generate chapters with timestamps. Saves clips with chapter markers. Gong integration or local processing.
entries.pain: Meeting recordings are unwatchable, and extracting relevant sections requires manual scrubbing.
